Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Which devotee in the Srimad-Bhagavatam inspires you the most?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2008-11-19 · 3 answers
and why?
user [313] · 2008-11-19
Sudama Brahmana. He could ask for anything, but he didnt. And he could easily run to Dwaraka like rocknroll groupie, he could see Krsna anytime, but he served in separation. It is so inspiring.
user [154] · 2008-11-19
The verses that I keep learning impress me the most, as I discover that there is so much in Srimad Bhagavatam. Wait till I get to the 10th canto, I hope to be dully impressed.
user [353] · 2008-12-09
Bali Maharaja, He had such integrity. Although outside he was acting as if a demon, but inside he was a pure devotee. And he knew the truth in his heart.
